name: textarea-with-text
visual_summary: A customizable text area component that displays the user's input with a placeholder text or a label. This component can be used in various settings like form inputs, chat windows, or comments sections. It's a versatile input field where the user can type and see the text in real-time.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: textarea-with-text
Description: A customizable text area component that displays the user's input with a placeholder text or a label. This component can be used in various settings like form inputs, chat windows, or comments sections. It's a versatile input field where the user can type and see the text in real-time.
Style: default, outlined
Interactions: typing, hover
Tags: forms, inputs, chat

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
